task: Fix project filter showing technical project name after page refresh for Project Admin not assigned to the project

key_reasoning.reason: Three symmetric filter components (AssistantFilters, SkillsFilters, WorkflowsFilters) across 2 layers (UI components + store state) all require the same change; async resolution timing adds coordination overhead but the pattern is clear

Three filter component files across three separate page directories (assistants, skills, workflows) plus 1 new SkillsListPage integration test file and 1-2 existing test fixture updates totals approximately 5-6 modified + 1 new file spanning 3+ directories
